name: VisualAnalysisMode
summary: Represents a base class for visual analysis modes. This class is abstract.

constructors.name: VisualAnalysisMode
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the VisualAnalysisMode class

methods.name: AdjustAnalysisMeshes
methods.signature: public static bool AdjustAnalysisMeshes(RhinoDoc doc, Guid analysisModeId)
methods.summary: Interactively adjusts surface analysis meshes of objects using a Rhino built-in analysis mode.

params.name: analysisModeId
params.doc: The id of the analysis mode.

methods.name: DrawBrepObject
methods.signature: protected virtual void DrawBrepObject(BrepObject brep, DisplayPipeline pipeline)
methods.summary: Draws one brep. Override this method to add your custom behavior. The default implementation does nothing.

methods.name: DrawCurveObject
methods.signature: protected virtual void DrawCurveObject(CurveObject curve, DisplayPipeline pipeline)
methods.summary: If Style==Wireframe, then the default decomposes the curve object into nurbs curve segments and calls the virtual DrawNurbsCurve for each segment.

methods.name: DrawMesh
methods.signature: protected virtual void DrawMesh(RhinoObject obj, Mesh mesh, DisplayPipeline pipeline)
methods.summary: Draws a mesh. The default implementation does nothing.

params.name: obj
params.doc: A Rhino object corresponding to the surface.

methods.name: DrawMeshObject
methods.signature: protected virtual void DrawMeshObject(MeshObject mesh, DisplayPipeline pipeline)
methods.summary: Draws one mesh. Override this method to add your custom behavior. The default implementation does nothing.

methods.name: DrawNurbsCurve
methods.signature: protected virtual void DrawNurbsCurve(RhinoObject obj, NurbsCurve curve, DisplayPipeline pipeline)
methods.summary: Draws a NURBS curve. This is a good function to override for analysis modes like curvature hair display. The default implementation does nothing.

params.name: obj
params.doc: A Rhino object corresponding to the curve.

methods.name: DrawNurbsSurface
methods.signature: protected virtual void DrawNurbsSurface(RhinoObject obj, NurbsSurface surface, DisplayPipeline pipeline)
methods.summary: Draws a NURBS surface. This is a good function to override to display object-related meshes. The default implementation does nothing.

params.name: obj
params.doc: A Rhino object corresponding to the surface.

methods.name: DrawPointCloudObject
methods.signature: protected virtual void DrawPointCloudObject(PointCloudObject pointCloud, DisplayPipeline pipeline)
methods.summary: Draws one point cloud. Override this method to add your custom behavior. The default implementation does nothing.

methods.name: DrawPointObject
methods.signature: protected virtual void DrawPointObject(PointObject point, DisplayPipeline pipeline)
methods.summary: Draws one point. Override this method to add your custom behavior. The default implementation does nothing.

methods.name: EnableUserInterface
methods.summary: Turns the analysis mode's user interface on and off. For Rhino's built in modes this opens or closes the modeless dialog that controls the analysis mode's display settings.

params.name: on
params.doc: true if the interface should be shown; false if it should be concealed.

methods.name: Find(Guid)
methods.summary: Finds a visual analysis mode by guid.

params.name: id
params.doc: The globally unique identifier to search for.

returns.doc: The found visual analysis mode, or null if it was not found, or on error.

methods.name: Find(Type)
methods.summary: Finds a visual analysis mode by type.

returns.doc: A visual analysis mode on success, or null on error.

methods.name: ObjectSupportsAnalysisMode
methods.summary: Gets a value indicating if this visual analysis mode can be used on a given Rhino object.

returns.doc: true if this mode can indeed be used on the object; otherwise false.

methods.name: Register
methods.summary: Registers a custom visual analysis mode for use in Rhino. It is OK to call register multiple times for a single custom analysis mode type, since subsequent register calls will notice that the type has already been registered.

params.name: customAnalysisModeType
params.doc: Must be a type that is a subclass of VisualAnalysisMode.

returns.doc: An instance of registered analysis mode on success.

methods.name: SetUpDisplayAttributes
methods.signature: protected virtual void SetUpDisplayAttributes(RhinoObject obj, DisplayPipelineAttributes attributes)
methods.summary: If an analysis mode needs to modify display attributes, this is the place to do it. In particular, Style==Texture, then this function must be overridden.
methods.remarks: Shaded analysis modes that use texture mapping, like zebra and emap, override this function set the texture, diffuse_color, and EnableLighting parameter.

params.name: obj
params.doc: The object for which to set up attributes.

methods.name: UpdateVertexColors
methods.signature: protected virtual void UpdateVertexColors(RhinoObject obj, Mesh[] meshes)
methods.summary: If Style==falseColor, then this virtual function must be overridden. Rhino calls this function when it is time for to set the false colors on the analysis mesh vertices. For breps, there is one mesh per face. For mesh objects there is a single mesh.

params.name: obj
params.doc: The object for which to update vertex colors.

params.name: meshes
params.doc: An array of meshes that should be updated.

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: Gets the visual analysis mode GUID. The Guid is specified with the GuidAttribute applied to the class.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets the name of the analysis mode. It is used by the _What command and the object properties details window to describe the object.

properties.name: RhinoCurvatureColorAnalyisModeId
properties.summary: Id for Rhino's built-in curvature color analysis mode. Surface curvature is shown using false color mapping.

properties.name: RhinoCurvatureGraphAnalysisModeId
properties.summary: Id for Rhino's built-in curvature graphs analysis mode. Curvature hair is shown on curves and surfaces.

properties.name: RhinoDraftAngleAnalysisModeId
properties.summary: Id for Rhino's built-in draft angle analysis mode. Draft angle is displayed using false colors.

properties.name: RhinoEdgeAnalysisModeId
properties.summary: Id for Rhino's built-in edge analysis mode. Brep and mesh edges are shown in a selected color.

properties.name: RhinoEdgeContinuityAlalysisModeId
properties.summary: Id for Rhino's built-in edge continuity analysis mode.

properties.name: RhinoEmapAnalysisModeId
properties.summary: Id for Rhino's built-in emap analysis mode. An environment map is shown on surfaces and meshes.

properties.name: RhinoThicknessAnalysisModeId
properties.summary: Id for Rhino's built-in thickness analysis mode.

properties.name: RhinoZebraStripeAnalysisModeId
properties.summary: Id for Rhino's built-in zebra stripe analysis mode. Zebra stripes are shown on surfaces and meshes.

properties.name: ShowIsoCurves
properties.summary: Gets true if this visual analysis mode will show isocuves on shaded surface objects. Often a mode's user interface will provide a way to change this setting. The default is false.

properties.name: Style
properties.summary: Gets the visual analysis mode style.
